applied.note: getUserPosition topPercent: total>0 ? Math.round((rank/total)*100) : 100 — NaN guard
getTopUsers category regex escaped via escapeRegex helper (ReDoS fix)
.lean() added to getTopCourses, getTopUsers, getUserPosition findOne (all read-only, no .save())
getTopUsers count+find parallelized via Promise.all; getUserPosition two counts parallelized too
All read-only finds (getPublicProfile user/stats/certs/prompts) already use .lean(); topPercent NaN guard already present
createPrompt UserStats.findOneAndUpdate now { upsert:true, new:true, setDefaultsOnInsert:true }
getPrompts limit clamp (1-100) + page>=1 via parseInt; skip/limit use clamped lim/pg, pagination shape preserved
submitQuiz: Array.isArray(answers) guard before .map() — 400 if not array

summary: 7 fixes applied across rankingController, promptController, xpController; userController was already fixed (.lean + topPercent guard already present). node --check passes for all 4 files. Response formats and pagination shapes preserved; no ObjectId validation added in controllers.
